allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking makes premortem stronger by tracing interdependencies and hidden failure pathways rather than listing isolated worries.
allies.source_quote: Premortem thinking is inherently aligned with Systems Thinking.

allies.rationale_text: Second-order-thinking gives premortem its domino-visualization discipline so the plan is tested beyond the first visible step.
allies.source_quote: The application of the Premortem requires participants to engage in second-order thinking.

allies.rationale_text: Checklists help premortem turn risk surfacing into a repeatable pre-commitment control instead of an improvised discussion.
allies.source_quote: Adopt analytic rigor by using the scientific method and checklists to minimize errors and omissions.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes premortem ceremonial by defending the favored plan instead of searching for failure causes that could really break it.
antagonists.source_quote: The Premortem is an effective technique for overriding confirmation bias.

antagonists.rationale_text: Commitment-bias hardens public commitment into escalation, making it harder for a premortem to bind reversal triggers before more sunk cost accumulates.
antagonists.source_quote: Premortem conflicts with Commitment Bias when publicly stated positions harden into escalation-of-commitment.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Premortem conflicts with commitment-bias when publicly stated positions harden into escalation-of-commitment and teams reinterpret disconfirming signals as temporary noise.
structured_tensions.source_quote: Premortem conflicts with Commitment Bias when publicly stated positions harden into escalation-of-commitment and teams reinterpret disconfirming signals as temporary noise.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Premortem conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams keep defending the favored plan instead of using the simulated failure to force genuine antithesis.
structured_tensions.source_quote: The Premortem provides the necessary antithesis to the initial thesis.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strong on systems-aware failure surfacing, second-order domino checks, and anti-escalation pressure, so the file preserves that bounded first-order surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor risk relations beyond the strongest current-vocabulary links around systems, weak-link exposure, and anti-plan-defense pressure.
open_questions: Conjunction-fallacy pressure is source-real, but the retained set favors the cleanest already-curated current-vocabulary models.
